common.name: Name
common.getStartedElement: Get started by adding your first element.

home.title: Shopmon - The Open-Source Dashboard for Shopware Developers
home.subtitle: Everything at a glance
home.description: Monitor all your Shopware environments from one central dashboard. Shop status, performance metrics, extension updates, and security alerts - all in real-time without switching between tools.
home.dashboardOverviewDesc: Maintain a complete overview of all your environments with the most important information using the Shopmon Dashboard
home.autoPerformanceChecksDesc: Get notified when your environment status changes based on Frosh-Tools performance checks
home.performanceMonitoringDesc: Daily automated page speed checks with an overview of the most important metrics over time
home.environmentStateDesc: Stay in control with the Shopmon Dashboard. View all your environments with information like Shopware version, environment status based on Frosh-Tools tests, and the latest changelogs.
home.froshToolsDesc: Get valuable insights and warnings about your environment. When Frosh Tools is installed, performance checks are automatically displayed and integrated into your environment status. If a task gets stuck or a new security update is available, you'll be immediately notified through your environment status. Additionally, you'll receive an email whenever your environment status changes.
home.extensionsDesc: Keep track of all your installed extensions either in the shop view or in the comprehensive extension overview. Get all the important information such as available updates, installed versions, and Shopware Store ratings. Connect with other Shopmon users to share solutions and discuss known issues directly and without detours.
home.sitespeedDesc: If you want, we perform daily sitespeed checks on up to 5 URLs of your environment and show you the most important information directly in an overview.
home.featureList: Passkey Login | GitHub Login | Remote Cache Clear | Scheduled Task Overview | Remote Task Rescheduling | Queue Overview | Environment Changelogs | More Features in Development
home.readyDesc: Join Shopmon to monitor your environments. Start monitoring your first environment in under 2 minutes - no credit card required, no commitments, just pure monitoring.
home.freeDesc: No hidden costs, subscription fees, or limitations. Shopmon is completely free to use for everyone, forever.
home.communityDrivenDesc: Built by the Friends of Shopware community for the community. Join our growing network of developers contributing daily.
home.openSourceDesc: Full transparency into how your data is handled. Inspect, modify, and contribute to the codebase on GitHub.

settings.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

environment.integrationDesc: The easiest way to get started is to install the {pluginLink} or create an integration in your Shopware Administration with the following permissions
environment.deleteEnvironmentWarning: Once you delete your environment, you will lose all data associated with it.
environment.sitespeedDesc: Sitespeed.io allows you to monitor the performance of your environment's frontend.
environment.sitespeedActivateDesc: To activate Sitespeed.io, you need to provide up to five URLs that you want to monitor. These URLs will be used to run performance tests and gather insights about your environment's frontend performance.
environment.sitespeedScheduleDesc: The Sitespeed run is scheduled to run every 24 hours, after the initial run you can view the results of Sitespeed directly in Shopmon.
environment.sitespeedUrlRequired: Please provide at least one URL when enabling Sitespeed
environment.bypassAuthHeaderDesc: If your website is protected by authentication, please configure the header shopmon-shop-token with the value below to be excluded, so Shopmon can function normally.
environment.base64InvalidData: Invalid data: missing required fields (url, clientId, clientSecret)
environment.base64InvalidFormat: Invalid base64 string or JSON format

shop.apiKeyInfo: API keys allow external applications to interact with your shop. Each key can have specific scopes to limit what actions it can perform.
shop.noApiKeysHint: Create an API key to allow external applications to access your shop.
shop.deleteShopWarning: Once you delete your shop, you will lose all data associated with it.
shop.deleteShopEnvironmentsWarning: This shop still has {count} environment(s). Move or delete them first.
shop.scopesHelp: Select the permissions this API key should have
shop.apiKeyCopyDesc: This is the only time you will see this key. Make sure to copy it and store it securely.
shop.deleteApiKeyWarning: Applications using this key will no longer be able to access your shop.
shop.getStarted: Get started by creating your first shop and adding environments to it.
shop.noEnvironmentsYet: No environments in this shop yet.

sso.issuerDiscoverHelp: Enter the issuer URL and click "Discover" to auto-fill endpoints

sso.clientSecretKeep: Leave empty to keep existing secret
sso.jwksEndpointHelp: JSON Web Key Set (JWKS) endpoint URL
sso.deleteProviderWarning: Users from this domain will no longer be able to use SSO to sign in.

deployments.setupDesc: Use the shopmon-cli to report deployments. Set the following environment variables and wrap your deployment command:
deployments.setupHint: The CLI automatically uses the local git HEAD commit SHA to link deployments to your git repository. If that is not available, you can set SHOPMON_DEPLOYMENT_VERSION_REFERENCE to specify it manually. The target git repository URL can be configured in the {link}.
deployments.deleteDeploymentConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this deployment? This action cannot be undone.

deleteModal.confirmText: Are you sure you want to delete **{name}**?
deleteModal.consequence: All of your data will be permanently removed from our servers forever. **This action cannot be undone.**

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.accountEmail: Email address and name for account creation
privacy.accountGithub: GitHub User ID if GitHub has been used as Login Provider
privacy.shopUrls: Shopware instance URLs and API Credentials (encrypted outside the Database using AES-GCM)
privacy.techLogs: Log files for debugging and security purposes
privacy.techSentry: Error tracking data (via Sentry referecing user id)
privacy.useNotifications: To send notifications about your environments' status
privacy.useImprove: To improve our service and troubleshoot issues
privacy.useSecurity: To ensure security and prevent abuse
privacy.storageServer: The Server is hosted at Oracle Cloud at Frankfurt in Germany
privacy.storageEncryption: Passwords are hashed, Shopware API Credentials are encrypted using AES-GCM
privacy.storageSeparation: Staging and Production are seperated and fixtures are used for development/testing
privacy.storageDeletion: When user deletes his environment/account, the data will be directly deleted
privacy.cookiesDesc: We do not include any external JavaScript library to the website.
privacy.contactDesc: For any privacy-related questions or concerns, please reach out to us through our official GitHub repository or per Mail to shopmon at fos.gg.

imprint.title: Legal notice
imprint.description: As a Non-Profit Website, it's not required to provide a legal representative. If you have questions or concerns, please reach out to us.

dataTable.noDataDesc: There is no data to display the table

updateWizard.title: Shopware Extension Compatibility Check
updateWizard.notInStore: This plugin is not available in the Store. Please contact the plugin manufacturer.

whatsNew.title: What's new: Packages Mirror
whatsNew.heroTitle: 75x faster Shopware store packages via Global CDN
whatsNew.heroDesc: Add your Shopware store tokens to a shop and serve packages through the Shopmon packages mirror — ~80ms instead of ~6s from packages.shopware.com.
whatsNew.featureCdn: Packages are cached on a Global CDN for near-instant Composer installs.
whatsNew.featureSync: Tokens sync automatically every hour — or trigger a manual sync any time.
whatsNew.featureValidation: Tokens are validated against the Shopware store before being saved.
whatsNew.quickSetupDesc: Add a Shopware store token in your shop settings, then replace packages.shopware.com with the mirror URL in your composer.json. The exact snippets are shown after adding a token.
whatsNew.sponsorsDesc: The public start page highlights the companies supporting ongoing Shopmon development.

packages.title: Packages Tokens
packages.description: Sync store packages through a Global CDN (~80ms vs ~6s). Tokens are synced automatically every hour.
packages.noTokensHint: Add a Shopware store token to sync packages through the mirror.
packages.composerWarning: Make sure to remove packages.shopware.com from your composer.json repositories before adding the mirror, otherwise Composer will still use the original source.
packages.composerRepoHint: Add the mirror as a repository in your composer.json:
packages.composerAuthHint: Authenticate using your Shopware store token:
packages.deleteTokenWarning: Packages synced with this token will no longer be available through the mirror.
packages.tokenHelp: The token from your Shopware account used to access store packages
packages.apiKeyHelp: A descriptive name to identify this API key
packages.composerCopied: Composer repository config copied to clipboard

onboarding.title: Set up your organization
onboarding.description: Organizations are the home for your Shopware environments, shops, and team members. Create one to get started, or ask a colleague to invite you to theirs.
onboarding.createDescription: Start fresh with your own organization. You can invite team members later.
onboarding.inviteDescription: If your team is already using Shopmon, ask them to send you an invitation. You'll receive an email with a link to join.
